creator: raimeetravel
caption:
my salary & job journey story from $35k to multi-six figures (and no I’m not selling a course lol) 

While running my business last year I upgraded to an @amd ai-powered laptop and it’s made such a huge difference in the speed of which I’m able to get things done! 

Although this isn’t a travel tip video, I know that financial & location independence makes a huge difference in how much one is able to travel and I always want to be transparent. I still traveled a LOT, even when I was making much less. 

Let me know what questions you have about how I got here!!!

Comment AMD and I’ll send you a link to the laptop 💻

transcription.text: i went from making 35k at a desk job that i hated to now making multiple six figures so here's how i did it and how my amd laptop has helped me plus all of the jobs i've had and salaries i've had along the way after graduating college with a degree in advertising i got that first desk job and while zoning out on zoom calls i was scheming ways to try and work in the travel industry i applied for a job to work for my favorite travel blogger at the time and i actually got it but that's a really long story of how i made okay money there but then i ended up getting laid off during covid after being fun employed for six months i needed to do something crazy to land a new job so i sent a very bold email directly to the ceo of a company i found on linkedin i got an interview i made a detailed presentation about why i wanted to work there and i got hired but i was still only making okay money i kept posting my travel videos and photos on the side and after almost a decade of trying it finally clicked and this turned into its own business then a year ago i upgraded to an amd ryzen ai powered laptop my old one could not keep up with everything i was doing anymore i needed something faster for all the editing i was doing and more portable longer lasting battery for all the travel i do and this was perfect finally i reached salary goals that i never even thought i could remember most overnight journeys are really years in the making and if you want the same laptop i use comment amd below and ask me any questions you have about this journey
